title: The Bundles Mod
description: In this mod, it adds, a mod all about a player named, _bundles_ with his new weapons, you could be come unbeatable
body:
What You Can Expect To Get In Downloading This Mod

First, there will be a new Boss, called "Bundles", "Bundles" does not spawn normally, so your will have to spawn him in your world, it fight him, but also he is really strong if You summon him, Now They're are new ores The bundle ore, and it has fully craftable amour and tools, but it is very rare. One Last Thing The "Bundles TNT", it works as normal tnt but 10x normal
